PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO ENTER INTO A PROTECTIVE ORDER GOVERNING ITS DISTRIBUTION. KIMPTON MAY REDACT THE PERCENTAGES OF PROFIT SHARING REFERENCED IN THE AGREEMENT. KIMPTON IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE A WITNESS FOR A RESUMED PMQ DEPOSITION REGARDING THE PORTIONS OF THE AGREEMENT THAT WERE PREVIOUSLY NOT MADE AVAILABLE. THE NAMES AND LAST KNOWN ADDRESSES OF FORMER EMPLOYEES OF KIMPTON SHALL BE PROVIDED BY KIMPTON. PERSONAL INFORMATION, SUCH AS DRIVER LICENSE NUMBERS AND DATES OF BIRTH ARE CONFIDENTIAL AND SHALL NOT BE PROVIDED. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED $650.00 SANCTIONS AGAINST KIMPTON. DEPOSITIONS AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS ARE TO BE COMPLETED BY JANUARY 8, 2016. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KIMPTON HOTEL & RESTAURANT GROUP, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied.
